description: Browse, search, and export public Luma events from one Go binary — no account, no API key, plus offline full-text search the public API doesn't have.

novel_features.name: Multi-city/category agenda
novel_features.description: One flat, date-sorted list of upcoming events across multiple cities and categories at once.

novel_features.name: Geo-radius event search
novel_features.description: Find events within N km of a lat/lng, ranked by distance.

novel_features.name: ICS export of any filtered set
novel_features.description: Export a synced/filtered set of events to a .ics calendar file your calendar app can import.

novel_features.name: Drift / new-since-last-sync
novel_features.description: Show what changed on synced events since the previous sync — new, removed, filling up, sold out, rescheduled.

novel_features.name: Multi-calendar aggregate compare
novel_features.description: Side-by-side upcoming-event counts and total guest counts across several calendars (communities).
